summary: Backend refactor regression test completed. Backend: 38/38 tests passed (100%). Fixed 11 model definition mismatches found during refactor. Frontend login form has a UI interaction issue (not related to backend refactor).

ui_bugs.issue: Login form on Sign in tab does not trigger login action when clicking Sign in button. Form reverts to Launch tab after clicking. This appears to be a pre-existing frontend issue, not caused by backend refactor.

action_items: Frontend: Investigate Sign in tab form submission - the button click doesn't trigger login API call
Note: Backend API /api/auth/login works correctly when called directly via curl
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: EventCreateRequest model was missing 7 fields: subyard_id, assigned_roles, map_url, special_focus, travel_coordination_notes, suggested_contribution, zoom_link
FIXED: MemoryCreateRequest model was missing 4 fields: event_id, category, image_data_url, voice_note_data_url
FIXED: RSVPRequest model was missing 'guests' field
FIXED: EventInviteCreateRequest model had wrong field names (invitees->member_ids, manual_emails->guest_emails, missing note)
FIXED: EventRoleAssignmentRequest model had wrong field names (assignments->role_name+assignees)
FIXED: ChecklistItemRequest model had wrong field names (label->category+title)
FIXED: ChecklistToggleRequest model had wrong field names (item_index+completed->item_id)
FIXED: VolunteerSlotRequest model had wrong field names (label->title, max_signups->needed_count)
FIXED: VolunteerSignupRequest model had wrong field name (slot_index->slot_id)
FIXED: PotluckClaimRequest model had wrong field name (item_index->item_id)
FIXED: LegacyTableConfigRequest model had wrong fields for new API structure
FIXED: EventPublic model was missing 15+ fields used by routes
FIXED: generate_memory_tags function call in timeline.py needed updated signature with community context

success_rate.frontend: Not fully tested due to login form UI issue - backend APIs verified working via direct API calls

seed_data_creation: Tests create and cleanup TEST_ prefixed events, announcements, polls, memories, travel plans, and budget plans
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend refactor from monolithic server.py to modular routes/ is complete and all 38 API tests pass. All Pydantic model definitions were corrected to match route implementations. Frontend login form has a UI issue where Sign in tab button click doesn't trigger login API - needs frontend investigation. Direct API calls to /api/auth/login work correctly.

passed: API root endpoint /api/ returns ready message

rca_of_the_issue: Multiple Pydantic model definitions in models.py were out of sync with the route implementations in routes/. This was likely caused during the refactor when routes were moved but models weren't updated to match. The most impactful issues were EventCreateRequest missing subyard_id (causing 500 errors on event creation), MemoryCreateRequest missing event_id and category fields, and generate_memory_tags signature change in ai_tagging.py requiring updated route code.
